---
title: "Koushik Khan"
description: "A data scientist by profession, an avid learner and a techie by heart"
from: markdown+emoji
image: "resources/img/profile-pic.jpg"
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/koushikkhan
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://www.twitter.com/__koushikkhan__/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/koushikkhan
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Contact Me
      href: mailto:koushikkhan38@gmail.com
---

Hello, myself Koushik Khan. I work as a Sr. Data Scientist at S&P Global Inc., Bangalore, India.

I have more than seven years of industry experience in working with varied data sets with right set of tools to help stakeholders taking informed decisions. 

This is my personal portfolio where I usually share my experiences in the form of blog posts. 

The list below is to help you navigate through the site.

+ {{< fa house >}} Home: This is where you are at right now
+ {{< fa blog >}} Blog: List of blog posts that I've written 
+ {{< fa laptop-file >}} Projects: Links to my personal projects
+ {{< fa life-ring >}} Skills: A curated list of projects with skills in academic and professional career
+ {{< fa clipboard >}} Resume: My latest resume is attached here 
+ {{< fa id-card-clip >}} About: About myself

Thanks.
